title: troximon pallidum
intro: Troximon pallidum, also known as pallid valerian or pale valerian, is a plant species in the genus Troximon within the family Asteraceae. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include its antispasmodic, diuretic, and sedative effects. The health benefits of Troximon pallidum include its ability to soothe anxiety, reduce inflammation, and alleviate menstrual cramps. Troximon pallidum can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are often used to promote relaxation and improve sleep quality.
